sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77292" key="pandake/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-δᾰκέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n77292.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">biting all</tr_>, of Cato, Epigr. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg025:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Ma.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
